title: First Aid Kit Checklist
scenario: Create a checklist for a basic first aid kit that includes supplies to treat common injuries such as cuts, burns, and sprains. The checklist should be written in a clear and concise manner suitable for medical professionals to use.
constraints: Must be written in a format suitable for medical professionals
Must include a list of necessary supplies for a basic first aid kit

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated checklist adheres to the given constraints (format, contents, word count).
The checklist includes accurate and up-to-date information on necessary supplies for a basic first aid kit.
The checklist is clear and easy to understand for the target audience (medical professionals).
